title: Vendor more deadlock fixes from c/storage

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *umohnani8* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.4.2-stable/OWNERS)~~ [umohnani8] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Let's hold off on merging until we are 100% certain this addresses the problem. It's already very questionable to be adding things to the stable branch before they hit master.
@lsm5 once this is in, we will need a new scratch build and regular build to be tagged into CI.

@mheon from the debugging last night, we are pretty sure that this targets the issue. @nalind suspected a deadlock happening while doing Load-calls-Save anyways, he just wasn't seeing how that code path was being triggered, but the logs confirm that now I believe. @nalind @vrothberg please correct me if I am mistaken.
Tests are green. @mheon @baude can we please get this in?
Do we have confirmation from the original reporter that this fixes the issue? I'm just a little reluctant to merge when the last patch went in without confirmation and did not resolve things...

/lgtm
We should merge whether or not this fixess the big issue.  Since this does prevent a potential deadlock.
